content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (SecureField in App/LoginView.swift:6) but demo credentials are placeholders (`demo_user.txt`: "test", `demo_password.txt`: "changeme") and review notes are just "TBD" (notes.txt:1), which may trigger a 2.1 rejection.
Pierre: Apple reviewers must be able to sign in and reach all core features immediately, or they reject under 2.1 (App Completeness / Information Needed). Here the credentials look like placeholders and the notes give no steps at all. Replace them with a real working demo account and notes explaining how to reach the app's main features behind the login.
